selection_policy: One small-to-moderate public or open PDF per glyphrush-v0 coverage category. PDFs are local ignored data; this registry and the generated manifest are the tracked test-case metadata.

documents.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
documents.license_note: ACL Anthology post-2016 publication; scout reported CC BY 4.0.
documents.expected_shape: Two-column academic PDF with tables, citations, section hierarchy, and dense references.
documents.selection_note: Representative academic-columns fixture without adding a large paper.

documents.title: FIRM Database Technical Reference, November 2024
documents.license_note: FEMA / US federal publication; generally public domain unless a specific third-party notice applies.
documents.expected_shape: Native digital technical reference with schema-like tables, appendices, repeated headings, and field definitions.
documents.selection_note: Clean digital native-text fixture that is not just prose.

documents.title: IRS Form 1040, 2025
documents.license_note: IRS / US federal form; generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Short fillable form with XFA/JavaScript, boxes, checkboxes, line numbers, and dense field labels.
documents.selection_note: Small, stable form fixture for unsupported-form flags and text extraction behavior.

documents.title: Watson v. Maryland, 218 U.S. 173
documents.license_note: GovInfo federal judicial publication; US government works are generally public domain with third-party caveats.
documents.expected_shape: Searchable scan with native OCR text plus full-page image layers, legal citations, headers, and narrow page geometry.
documents.selection_note: Hybrid fixture that should avoid blind OCR while still exposing image-backed pages.

documents.title: NASA Systems Engineering Handbook
documents.license_note: NASA publication; generally reproducible unless copyrighted material is specifically noted.
documents.expected_shape: 297-page handbook with native text, diagrams, repeated headers, process tables, and appendices.
documents.selection_note: Large enough to stress throughput without the 1,000-plus-page MUTCD fixture.

documents.title: IRS Form 1095-C, 2025
documents.license_note: IRS / US federal form; generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: All-landscape form pages with wide tabular regions and form/XFA metadata.
documents.selection_note: Landscape-orientation fixture. Scout did not confirm nonzero /Rotate metadata, so a strict rotated-page fixture should be added later.

documents.title: US4399515, Self-correcting electronically scanned pressure sensor
documents.license_note: Official USPTO patent PDF and public record; verify bulk redistribution terms before committing binaries.
documents.expected_shape: Image-only patent pages with empty native text, full-page CCITT imagery, columns, and drawings.

documents.title: OMB FY2027 Table 16-1, Federal Budget by Agency and Account
documents.license_note: White House / OMB federal publication; generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Long landscape PDF dominated by repeated budget-account tables, wrapped account labels, numeric columns, and section headers.
documents.selection_note: Table-heavy corpus fixture that is much smaller than the full budget appendix.

documents.title: veraPDF PDF/A CMaps fail fixture
documents.license_note: veraPDF corpus is CC BY 4.0 according to its repository README.
documents.selection_note: Tiny weird-encoding regression fixture for fast repeated eval.

reference_only_candidates.title: MUTCD 11th Edition with Revision 1
reference_only_candidates.reason: Useful large/rotated/map/sign-table stress case, but too large for the initial seed corpus.

reference_only_candidates.title: USGS San Francisco North US Topo
reference_only_candidates.reason: Useful geospatial/rotated-label stress case, but roughly 40 MB for a single-page seed.

reference_only_candidates.title: Diodes AP7354 datasheet
reference_only_candidates.reason: Already represented by local datasheet fixtures; redistribution license is unclear.
